# MOOT Memory Documentation

Use this page as the documentation front door for `v1.0.32`.

## Start here

Start with LocusKit for structured memory, VectorKit for similarity search, or CorpusKit for a complete text retrieval engine.

| Package | Responsibility | Swift product | Rust crate |
|---|---|---|---|
| [`LocusKit`](../packages/kits/LocusKit/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Structured estate memory, knowledge graph, audit, and recall | `LocusKit` | `locus-kit` |
| [`VectorKit`](../packages/kits/VectorKit/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Durable on-device vector and fingerprint search | `VectorKit` | `vectorkit` |
| [`CorpusKit`](../packages/kits/CorpusKit/docs/OVERVIEW.md) | Chunking, BM25, embeddings, and hybrid local RAG | `CorpusKit and CorpusKitProviders` | `corpus-kit and corpus-kit-providers` |

## Choose the right document

- **LocusKit:** [overview](../packages/kits/LocusKit/docs/OVERVIEW.md), [implementation detail](../packages/kits/LocusKit/docs/DETAILS.md), [AI and maintainer map](../packages/kits/LocusKit/docs/AGENT_MAP.md)
- **VectorKit:** [overview](../packages/kits/VectorKit/docs/OVERVIEW.md), [implementation detail](../packages/kits/VectorKit/docs/DETAILS.md), [AI and maintainer map](../packages/kits/VectorKit/docs/AGENT_MAP.md)
- **CorpusKit:** [overview](../packages/kits/CorpusKit/docs/OVERVIEW.md), [implementation detail](../packages/kits/CorpusKit/docs/DETAILS.md), [AI and maintainer map](../packages/kits/CorpusKit/docs/AGENT_MAP.md)

- [`PACKAGE_MAP.md`](PACKAGE_MAP.md) is the exact product, crate, and path map.
- [`DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.md`](DEPENDENCY_GRAPH.md) shows how the four SDK repos compose.
- [`CONFORMANCE.md`](CONFORMANCE.md) explains Swift and Rust agreement gates.
- [`DATA_PROVENANCE.md`](DATA_PROVENANCE.md) records pinned artifact origin.
- [`PUBLISH_REPORT.md`](PUBLISH_REPORT.md) records what entered this release.
- [`../SECURITY.md`](../SECURITY.md) gives the private reporting path.
- [`../CONTRIBUTING.md`](../CONTRIBUTING.md) explains contribution boundaries.

## Other SDK repositories

| Repository | Use it for |
|---|---|
| [`moot-memory`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-memory) | Structured memory, vector search, and local RAG |
| [`moot-semantics`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-semantics) | ARIA vocabulary and deterministic local classification |
| [`moot-system`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-system) | Storage, datasets, queues, sync, telemetry, and loopback HTTP |
| [`moot-core`](https://github.com/codedaptive/moot-core) | Shared types, kernel, fingerprints, lifecycle rules, and memory math |

The full product and public SDK map lives in
[`codedaptive/mootx01-ce`](https://github.com/codedaptive/mootx01-ce/blob/stable/1.0.x/SDK.MD).
